'''kangaza''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fibrocystin|fibrocystin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-ng-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fibrocystin|fibrocystin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| kangaza
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || kængæzæth || kængæzæj || kængæzæsh || kængæzæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || kangangazath || kangangazaj || kangangazash || kangangaza
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || kangazath || kangazaj || kangazash || kangaza
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || kangafzafth || kangafzafj || kangafzafsh || kangafzaf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || kangazatha || kangazaja || kangazasha || kangazaka
|-
| [[Patient]] || kangazath || kangazaj || kangazash || kangaza
|-
| [[Possessive]] || kangazathal || kangazajal || kangazashal || kangazakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || kangazaathatha || kangazaajaja || kangazaashasha || kangazaaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || kangazathan || kangazajan || kangazashan || kangazakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || kangazathaoro || kangazajaoro || kangazashaoro || kangazakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
